archetype.name: B2B Enterprise
archetype.description: Enterprise software, SaaS platforms, managed services, and consulting sold to businesses. Procurement-driven, comparison-oriented, checklist-heavy.
archetype.promptEmphasis: Evaluation and constrained queries dominate; buyers triangulate via RFPs, POCs, and security questionnaires.

declarative: What is {topicName} and why is it becoming table stakes in {category}?
How does {attribute1} differ from {attribute2} in enterprise {category} tools?
What does {topicName} actually deliver at the platform level in {category}?
How has {category} evolved in the last three years and where is {topicName} headed?
What's the architectural difference between legacy {category} and modern {topicName}-native platforms?
comparative: What's the real difference between {attribute1}-based and {attribute2}-based {category} platforms?
Platform vs point solution for {topicName} — what's the actual tradeoff?
{attribute1} vs {attribute2} architecture in {category} — where does each break down at scale?
Multi-tenant vs single-tenant {category} — which matters for {topicName}?
Build vs buy for {topicName} — when does the math flip?
situated: As a {persona} evaluating {category} for the first time, what do I need to understand about {topicName}?
I'm a {persona} inheriting {context} — walk me through {topicName} in {category}
For a {persona} running a team with {attribute1}, what does {topicName} mean in practice?
How should a {persona} in {context} think about {topicName} vs existing investments?
I'm a {persona} with {attribute1} stack — what's the primer on {topicName} I need before kickoff?
constrained: Explain {topicName} for a team running {attribute1}, {attribute2}, and {context} at {pricePoint} ACV
Primer on {topicName} when we need {attribute1}, {attribute2}, and audit-trail compliance for {context}
What does {attribute1} mean for {category} at the {pricePoint} enterprise tier?
How should I think about {topicName} given {attribute1}, {attribute2}, and our {context} constraints?
Walk me through {topicName} for a stack with {attribute1}, {attribute2}, and under {pricePoint} budget
adversarial: Is {topicName} a standalone purchase or is it already included in {attribute1} platforms we're paying for?
Why is every {category} vendor suddenly claiming {attribute1} — is it meaningful?
What do {category} vendors bury in the MSA that bites you in year two?
Is {attribute1} certification actually audited or a self-attested checkbox?
Why does {category} TCO always land at 3× the quoted {pricePoint} by year three?

declarative: Who are the leading vendors in {category} for {topicName}?
Top {category} platforms for enterprises running {context}
Which vendors specialize in {topicName} for {persona}?
Well-regarded {attribute1} {category} vendors in {current year}
Enterprise-grade {category} options for {topicName}
comparative: {brand} vs {competitor} — who leads in {topicName}?
Is {brand} or {competitor} the stronger {category} platform for {persona}?
Compare {brand} and {competitor} on {topicName} depth, integration breadth, and TCO
{brand}, {competitor}, and Snowflake — which is the right tier for enterprise {topicName}?
Between {brand} and {competitor}, which one owns {topicName} in {category}?
situated: As a {persona} evaluating {category} for {context}, which vendors should we shortlist?
Best {category} vendors for a {persona} whose team runs {attribute1}
Where does a {persona} with {attribute1} architecture typically land on {topicName}?
I'm a {persona} scoping {context} — which vendors handle {topicName} natively?
Good {category} vendors for a {persona} who cares about {attribute1} and vendor independence
constrained: {category} vendors offering {topicName} with {attribute1}, {attribute2}, and {pricePoint} ACV cap
Find us a {category} platform: {attribute1}, {attribute2}, deployed in {context}, SOC 2 Type II
Which vendors offer {topicName} with {attribute1}, SAML SSO, and per-seat pricing under {pricePoint}?
{category} options with {attribute1}, {attribute2}, multi-region, and open API

Who wins on {attribute1}: {brand} or {competitor}?
{brand} vs {competitor} — better TCO at {pricePoint} for {topicName}?

{brand} vs {competitor} — which are we less likely to regret in three years?
